# ipzilon_hubs (Data Source)

List hubs. Provide id (singular lookup) OR site_id (list all hubs for a site).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all hubs in a site
data "ipzilon_hubs" "all" {
  site_id = 1
}

# Lookup a single hub by ID
data "ipzilon_hubs" "single" {
  id = 1
}

output "hub_cidr" {
  value = data.ipzilon_hubs.all.items[0].address_space
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Lookup a single hub by ID.
- `site_id` (Number) List all hubs in a site.

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `address_space` (String) Hub address space CIDR.
- `description` (String) Free-text description.
- `id` (Number)
- `location` (String) Free-text location label.
- `name` (String) Hub name.
- `site_id` (Number)
